case_title: JENKINS, HENRY W. VS TOMOLA, EDWARD L.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,625.00 FILED BY JENKINS, HENRY W. AS TO DEFENDANT TOMOLA, EDWARD L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-1995 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JENKINS, HENRY W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOMOLA, EDWARD L. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,525.00, DEFENDANT OT PAY $2500.00 TO PLAINTIFF ON OR BEFORE MAR. 1, 1995. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
